cards.english: I am a doctor, and she is a nurse.
You are the best student in the class.
We are friends, and that is important.
Why is the movie so long?
The keys are for the doors.
I am the father of the girls.
It is a gift for you, not for them.
The tomatoes are for the salad.
She is my sister, and you are my friend.
Why are you a teacher?
They are the winners, and that is good for us.
The meeting is at night, and it is important.
I am not the boss; he is the boss.
The shoes are new, and they are for the party.
You are very kind with the customers.
Why is that a problem for the school?
We are a family, and the family is everything.
The books are for the students; that is why I bought them.
It is important that you study in the morning.
I am tall, and my brothers are tall too.
